idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends searches for emergency dental services signals consumer stress lifting healthcare sector
behavior: Sudden spikes in emergency dental service searches reflect rising consumer health issues and stress, often preceding increased healthcare utilization.

market_impact.rationale: Higher demand for emergency dental services signals healthcare sector revenue growth potential.

trade_logic.entry: Trigger when weekly Google Trends search interest for 'emergency dental services' rises by more than 25% compared to 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or when the search interest falls below the 4-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Health-related search interest frequently fluctuates weekly due to seasonal and episodic stress factors.

idea: Daily uptick in freight logistics port container volume deviation signals industrial sector momentum burst
behavior: Abrupt daily increases in container throughput beyond normal volatility indicate accelerating industrial demand and supply chain activity.

market_impact.rationale: Increased freight activity signals expanding industrial production and shipping demand.

trade_logic.entry: Enter when daily container volume exceeds 3 standard deviations above its 20-day moving average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or when volume normalizes within 1 standard deviation

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Daily container volume spikes happen frequently due to shipping schedule variations and demand surges.

idea: Weekly Google Trends spike in job search for 'remote work' signals labor sector rotation to tech
behavior: Sudden increases in remote work job searches reflect shifting labor demand and preferences toward technology-enabled roles.

market_impact.rationale: Rising remote work interest suggests strength in tech sector employment and productivity enhancements.

trade_logic.entry: Trigger when weekly search interest rises by 20% above 8-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when interest falls below 8-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Remote work job interest fluctuates regularly with corporate hiring cycles and macroeconomic sentiment.

idea: Daily jump in Google Trends for 'DIY car tire repair' signals consumer stress impacting discretionary sector

idea: Daily spike in local economy weirdness: sudden surge in food truck health code violations signals restaurant sector pressure
